PreToolUse.command: bash -c 'if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q "git commit.*--no-verify\|skip.*test\|YOLO"; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\": {\"hookEventName\": \"PreToolUse\", \"permissionDecision\": \"ask\", \"permissionDecisionReason\": \"Safety check: Attempting to skip tests or verification. PeachTree requires all 129+ tests to pass before commit.\"}}"; exit 0; else echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\": {\"hookEventName\": \"PreToolUse\", \"permissionDecision\": \"allow\"}}"; exit 0; fi'

SessionStart.command: bash -c 'cd /tmp/peachtree && echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"PeachTree Dataset Control Plane - Safety-First Mode Active\\n✓ 129+ tests required to pass\\n✓ 0 linting violations required\\n✓ Local-only by default (no public scraping)\\n✓ Human approval required for training\\nRun: pytest tests/ -v && ruff check src/ tests/\"}" && exit 0'
